reviews.comment:
Atención en playa "bastante que desear" y el bar perdió encanto y calidad...los sandwiches marca *individuales* incomibles, húmedos, gomosos, unico rescatable los baños..... en fin muy malo todo....a mejorar estimados !!!

(Translated by Google)
Beach service "much to be desired" and the bar lost charm and quality...the brand sandwiches *individual* were inedible, moist, rubbery, the only redeeming feature were the bathrooms...in short, everything was very bad...needs to improve, dear friends!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJb2RPQVB3EAE
